title: Binary Trees With Factors
hints: Sort the array first. This ensures that when considering a number, all potential factors smaller than it have already been processed.
Use dynamic programming where dp[x] counts trees with root x. For each x, iterate through smaller y in the array to check if y divides x.
If y divides x and x/y is also in the array, add dp[y] * dp[x/y] to dp[x]. Sum all dp values for the final answer.
